name: EZPAWN
description_short: Houston's EZPAWN location at 5502 Bellaire Blvd provides pawn loans, gold buying, and merchandise sales.
description_long:
EZPAWN's Houston, TX location at 5502 Bellaire Blvd is a standalone pawn shop in the Bellaire area. The shop operates extended hours Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, Saturday from 9AM to 6PM, and Sunday from 12PM to 5PM, making it accessible for Houston residents with varying schedules. Whether you need quick cash or want to browse merchandise, the Bellaire Boulevard store serves Houston neighborhoods.

At this Houston location, EZPAWN provides pawn loans on a range of items, buys gold and precious metals, and stocks a rotating inventory of merchandise. Call 713-664-2274 to ask about current inventory, get a quick quote on items, or learn about loan terms and rates available at this Houston store.

When visiting the Houston EZPAWN on Bellaire Blvd, bring a valid photo ID and any items you want to pawn or sell. The store handles jewelry, electronics, collectibles, and other valuables. It's a straightforward, transparent process perfect for Houston residents needing quick funding between paychecks.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program enables online management of pawns, layaways, and points — uncommon in pawn retail
Instant Quote tool lets customers estimate electronics value before visiting the store
Pre-owned retail inventory priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new arrivals
Layaway available with only 10% down and affordable monthly payments
Firearms accepted as collateral or purchased outright at this Las Vegas location
Gold and diamond jewelry tested on-site to help ensure accurate, fair pricing
Take Today third-party financing offers up to 12+ months of deferred payment on purchases
cons: Pawn loan interest rates, APR, and fee structure are not disclosed on the website
Take Today flexible payment requires credit eligibility — not available to all customers
Firearms lending and purchasing only available at select store locations, not chain-wide
Online payments are restricted and not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (scope limitation for multi-state customers)
All merchandise is pre-owned with no manufacturer warranty; protection plans are an added cost
best_for: People who need same-day cash and own electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms to use as collateral
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name electronics, gaming gear, or jewelry at steep discounts
Gun owners looking for a collateral loan or outright sale of firearms
Gold and jewelry sellers who want an in-person appraisal with on-site metal testing
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who need fast cash against personal property or want heavily discounted pre-owned goods, particularly those who own electronics, jewelry, or firearms. The EZ+ digital tools and Instant Quote feature make it more convenient than most independent pawn shops. The main caveat is that loan costs — interest rates and fees — are not published online, so borrowers must evaluate terms in person before committing.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based, cash on the spot)
Pre-owned retail merchandise sales (25–70% off new retail)
Online shop with daily new inventory
EZ+ Rewards Program (digital pawn/layaway management, reward points)
Online payments for pawn extensions and layaways
Take Today third-party purchase financing (up to 12+ months)
Product Protection Plan for electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, stone replacement, free cleaning)
meta_description: EZPAWN at 5502 Bellaire Blvd, Houston, TX. Quick pawn loans and gold buying.
